untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pair trading with cointegration analysis (ADF test p-value comparison, spread calculation between two instruments, and mean reversion triggers). The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) cointegration testing capabilities, (2) cross-instrument spread calculations, (3) statistical relationship metrics between pairs, or (4) dynamic mean/standard deviation thresholds across paired instruments. The signal cannot be expressed using single-instrument price/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_1 is a pairs trading strategy requiring bivariate cointegration analysis. While individual components reference concepts that could theoretically map to indicators (e.g., 'spread reverts to mean' → Bollinger Bands or price_pos_20), the core logic depends on calculating the spread between two distinct instruments and testing their cointegration relationship. The backtest engine would need custom pair-trading modules or external statistical test outputs (ADF p-values) to implement this signal. Recommend: (1) Add cointegration_test and spread_zscore custom indicators, or (2) Flag this as requiring a specialized pairs trading module outside standard single-instrument backtesting.
